title: ANC - Switch from Transparency Mode to ANC Mode
scenario: Verify that switching from Transparency Mode to ANC Mode disables Transparency and retains previously selected ANC level
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
Navigate to the Home screen and tap on the connected [Device Name].
Go to Audio Settings → ANC / Transparency Mode.
Ensure Transparency Mode is currently ON and set to a previously selected value (e.g., Environment or Speech).
Tap the ANC toggle to turn ANC ON.
Observe the Transparency Mode toggle and its selected value (Environment or Speech).
Observe the ANC toggle and its selected value.
expected: When ANC is turned ON, Transparency Mode switches OFF and its previously selected value (Environment or Speech) is greyed out/disabled. ANC is set to ON with its previously selected value.
